response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be proactive in monitoring your accounts and fact-checking information before sharing. Additionally, using trustworthy sources and verifying the authenticity of posts can help reduce the spread of misinformation. It's also crucial to be mindful of your own biases and avoid jumping to conclusions based solely on confirmation bias. Finally, engaging in respectful and open-minded dialogue with others can help foster a more informed and inclusive online community.

They have a high level of openness, which allows them to be more receptive to new information and ideas. Their depressed psychological feature may make them more cautious when consuming and sharing content online.
